# Mythras // The Multiverse

> Independent gaming creator hub run by Mythras. Long-form strategy guides, tier lists, deck techs, and per-character build pages across seven games: Cookie Run: Kingdom, Cookie Run: Braverse (TCG), Magic: The Gathering, Minecraft, Roblox, Fortnite, and PUBG: Battlegrounds. Launched as the CookieRun Mythras YouTube channel in 2022; now a multi-channel ecosystem with 373+ blog guides.

The site combines four content systems: (1) the blog at /blog covers tier lists, build/deck guides, format and mechanic primers, beginner walkthroughs, and patch/set coverage across all seven games; (2) /gear-guide covers per-Cookie build recommendations for 167+ Cookies in Cookie Run: Kingdom; (3) /cake-tower covers tower-strategy walkthroughs; (4) /assistant is a chat interface that answers from site content and recommends relevant guides. Every guide is written by the Mythras team and fact-checked against authoritative sources (Scryfall for MTG card legality, the official Cookie Run: Braverse card database, and the game wikis) before publishing.

## Cookie Run: Kingdom

- [Cookie Run: Kingdom Blog Hub](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom): Gacha RPG team-building: tier lists, per-Cookie toppings/beascuit builds, Arena and Guild Battle comps, Beast-Yeast, Cake Tower, and patch coverage.
- [Cotton Cookie Toppings Build — The Best Summoner Support, Geared Right](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/cotton-cookie-toppings-build): The best Cotton Cookie toppings build in Cookie Run: Kingdom: 5x Swift Chocolate vs the 3+2 Solid Almond hybrid, the substats to chase, and where she fits.
- [CRK Mileage Points Guide — The F2P Currency You Keep Wasting](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/crk-mileage-points-guide): Cookie Run: Kingdom Mileage Points explained: how you earn them, exact per-pull values, what to buy in the Mileage Shop, and the F2P priority order.
- [Sherbet Cookie Toppings Build — The Ice DPS Enabler, Geared Right](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/sherbet-cookie-toppings-build): The best Sherbet Cookie toppings build in Cookie Run: Kingdom: Swift Chocolate vs Searing Raspberry, the Ice DMG and Debuff Resist Bypass case, and where he fits.
- [Best CRK Arena Defense Teams — Comps That Win While You Sleep](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/best-crk-arena-defense-teams): The best Cookie Run: Kingdom Arena defense teams: how AI-run defense works, which comps punish attackers, Hidden Cookie tricks, and how to climb the ladder faster.
- [CRK Speedrun Teams — Fast Auto-Clear Farming Comps That Work](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/crk-speedrun-teams-guide): Build the fastest Cookie Run: Kingdom speedrun teams for auto-clearing and farming: which DPS cookies delete stages, the 2.5x speed settings, and comps to copy.
- [Mercurial Knight Cookie Toppings Build — Silver Wall, Geared Right](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/mercurial-knight-cookie-toppings-build): The best Mercurial Knight Cookie toppings build in Cookie Run: Kingdom: Solid Almond vs Searing Raspberry, the DMG Resist debate, Mercury Poison scaling, and fit.
- [Clotted Cream Cookie Toppings Build — The Arena Disruptor, Geared Right](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/clotted-cream-cookie-toppings-build): The best Clotted Cream Cookie toppings build in Cookie Run: Kingdom: Searing Raspberry vs Solid Almond, the ATK/Cooldown/DMG Resist debate, and where he fits.
- [Cookie Run: Kingdom Balloon Expedition Guide — Free Toppings on a Timer](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/crk-balloon-expedition-guide): How the Balloon Dock works in Cookie Run: Kingdom: sending Expeditions, Super Success odds, the Crispia and Beast-Yeast routes, and the daily routine that pays.
- [Cookie Run: Kingdom Guild Battle Guide — 4 Bosses, Rounds & Rewards](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/crk-guild-battle-guide): How Guild Battle works in Cookie Run: Kingdom: the four shared-damage bosses, the four-round season, Guild Trophies, Heroic Medals, and the routine that maxes rewards.
- [Cookie Run: Kingdom Super Mayhem Guide — 3 Teams, Moon Aspects & Ranking Up](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/crk-super-mayhem-guide): Cookie Run: Kingdom Super Mayhem guide: how the 3-team best-of-three PvP mode works, Moon Aspects, the rarity caps, ranking from Chocolate to Grandmaster.
- [Star Coral Cookie Toppings Build & Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/star-coral-cookie-toppings-build): Star Coral Cookie build guide: the Cooldown topping spread, substat priorities, beascuit picks, the all-in-one Twinkling Coral skill, and team comps.
- [Twizzly Gummy Cookie Toppings Build & Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/twizzly-gummy-cookie-toppings-build): Twizzly Gummy Cookie build guide: the ATK vs Crit topping split, substat priorities, beascuit, Magic Candy, the shield-shredding Zap, and where she fits.
- [Candy Apple Cookie Toppings Build & Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/candy-apple-cookie-toppings-build): Candy Apple Cookie build for June 2026: the toppings that actually matter, substat priority, beascuit and tart picks, Magic Candy, and where her debuffs shine.
- [CRK Dragon's Lair Guide — The Guild Battle Raid Bosses Explained](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/crk-dragons-lair-guide): What people call CRK's Dragon's Lair is Guild Battle. Here's how the mode works, all four raid bosses, attempts, and the rewards that make it worth grinding.
- [Capsaicin Cookie Toppings Build & Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/capsaicin-cookie-toppings-build): Capsaicin Cookie build guide: the Raspberry burst spread vs the Almond bruiser hybrid, substat priorities, beascuit and Magic Candy picks, and team comps.
- [Cookie Run: Kingdom Sugar Gnome Laboratory Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/crk-sugar-gnome-lab-guide): How the Sugar Gnome Laboratory works in Cookie Run: Kingdom — Kingdom vs Cookie tech trees, research costs, the research-speed tricks, and what to unlock first.
- [Cookie Run: Kingdom Cookie Alliance Guide — 25-Cookie Comps, Shadow Hex & Relics](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/crk-cookie-alliance-guide): Cookie Run: Kingdom Cookie Alliance guide: how the 5-team mode works, Shadow Hex, Beacon of Valor, treasure reuse, and pushing deeper for better relics.
- [Elder Faerie Cookie Toppings Build & Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/elder-faerie-cookie-toppings-build): Elder Faerie Cookie build guide for June 2026: the Cooldown topping spread, substat priorities, beascuit pick, the White Lily synergy, and best team comps.
- [Endless Strawberry Cake Tower Walkthrough (2026) — Tray Strategy & Comps](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/endless-strawberry-tower-walkthrough): Push deep into the Endless Strawberry Cake Tower. Full 2026 walkthrough: how the no-gear rules change everything, comp picks by tray tier, the Tray 40 boss, and what to actually build.
- [White Lily Cookie Toppings Build & Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/white-lily-cookie-toppings-build): White Lily Cookie build guide for June 2026: the Cooldown-and-ATK topping split, substat priorities, beascuit and tart picks, the Dawnbringer form, and team comps.

Beginner-to-Endgame Guide to CRK v7.4](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-kingdom/timeline-of-fate-update-guide): Honest breakdown of Cookie Run: Kingdom v7.4 Timeline of Fate Act 2 — Timekeeper, Ash Salt, 6-star Legendaries, Arcade Arena, Unstable Timeline, and which players should actually log in.

## Cookie Run: Braverse

- [Cookie Run: Braverse Blog Hub](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg): Devsisters' Cookie Run trading card game: the five colors, the FLIP mechanic, card-type and rarity primers, per-color card rankings, starter decks, and set reviews — all cross-checked against the official card database.
- [Cookie Run: Braverse Matchup Guide - Archetype vs Archetype](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-matchup-guide): How the top Cookie Run: Braverse archetypes play against each other: Aggro, Control, Ramp, Combo, and Disruption matchups, who is the beatdown, and how to win each.
- [Cookie Run: Braverse Color Pairs Guide: Which Two-Color Decks Actually Work](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-color-pairs-guide): Which Cookie Run: Braverse two-color pairs are worth building? Real card examples, the generic-energy math that makes splashes work, and the pairs that fight themselves.
- [Cookie Run: Braverse Tempo Deck Guide (Build & Pilot Blue Tempo)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-tempo-deck-guide): Build and pilot a Blue-Red tempo deck in Cookie Run: Braverse - a real sample decklist, the bounce-and-beat game plan, mulligan tips, and how to keep the clock.
- [Cookie Run: Braverse Buying Guide: What to Actually Buy First](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-buying-guide): Starter deck vs booster box vs singles in Cookie Run: Braverse - which set to start with, sealed-vs-singles, box math, and a no-waste new-player purchase path.
- [Cookie Run: Braverse Combo Deck Guide (Build & Pilot Purple Recursion)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-combo-deck-guide): Build and pilot a Purple recursion combo deck in Cookie Run: Braverse: a real 60-card decklist, the trash-loop engine, mulligan tips, and how to grind a win.
- [Cookie Run: Braverse Mill Deck Guide (Build & Pilot Purple Deck-Out)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-mill-deck-guide): Build and pilot a Purple mill / deck-out control deck in Cookie Run: Braverse: a real 60-card decklist, the trash-threshold engine, and how to starve them out.
- [Cookie Run: Braverse Control Deck Guide (Build & Pilot Blue/Purple Control)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-control-deck-guide): Build and pilot a Blue/Purple control deck in Cookie Run: Braverse: a real 60-card decklist, removal and draw engine, mulligan plan, and how to win late.
- [Cookie Run: Braverse Midrange Deck Guide (Build & Pilot Green/Yellow Midrange)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-midrange-deck-guide): Build and pilot a Green/Yellow midrange deck in Cookie Run: Braverse: a real 60-card decklist, the value game plan, mulligan tips, and how to grind out wins.
- [Cookie Run: Braverse Aggro Deck Guide (Build & Pilot Red Aggro)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-aggro-deck-guide): Build and pilot a Red aggro deck in Cookie Run: Braverse: a real sample Arena decklist, the game plan, mulligan tips, and how to close the game.
- [Cookie Run: Braverse Turn Structure & Phases Explained](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-turn-structure-guide): Cookie Run: Braverse turn structure explained: the Refresh, Draw, Main and End phases, what you can do when, and the first-player turn-1 limits.
- [Cookie Run: Braverse Energy & Leveling Explained](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-energy-guide): Cookie Run: Braverse energy and leveling explained - how energy types and color costs work, how the Support Area pays, and how LV.1-LV.3 gating works.
- [Cookie Run: Braverse Meta Tier List — Best Decks & Archetypes Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-meta-tier-list): A Cookie Run: Braverse meta tier list ranking the best decks and archetypes - Yellow control, Arena, Red aggro and more - with the real cards behind each.
- [Best Arena Cards in Cookie Run: Braverse, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/best-arena-cards-cookie-run-braverse): The best Arena keyword cards in Cookie Run: Braverse, ranked - Capsaicin, Prune Juice, Kouign-Amann and the cross-color go-wide synergy engine.
- [Cookie Run: Braverse Keywords & Abilities Explained](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-keywords-explained): Cookie Run: Braverse keywords explained - On Play, Activate, Blocker, Equip and EXTRA, plus FLIP and the Ancient, Dragon, Beast and Arena traits.
- [Cookie Run: Braverse FAQ: Common Questions Answered](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/cookie-run-braverse-tcg/cookie-run-braverse-faq): New-player Cookie Run: Braverse questions answered: how to win, deck size and copy limits, where to buy, how FLIP works, the five colors, and is it pay-to-win.

How to build toward each and read the board.

## Magic: The Gathering

- [Magic: The Gathering Blog Hub](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering): Wizards of the Coast's flagship TCG: Commander staples by category, best-card-by-color rankings, format primers (Commander, Standard, Modern, Pioneer, Pauper, Limited), and set/meta coverage — card legality verified via Scryfall.
- [Best Cantrips in MTG, Ranked: Cheap Card Selection](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-mtg-cantrips): The best cantrips in MTG, ranked. Ponder, Preordain, Brainstorm, Serum Visions and the cheap card-selection spells that smooth every draw and fuel combo decks.
- [Best Voltron Equipment in MTG Commander, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-mtg-voltron-equipment-commander): The best Voltron equipment in MTG Commander, ranked. Swords, Colossus Hammer, Embercleave and the gear that turns one commander into a 21-damage kill.
- [Best Fast Mana in MTG Commander, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-mtg-fast-mana-commander): The best fast mana in MTG Commander, ranked. Sol Ring, Mana Vault, rituals, Ancient Tomb — burst-mana that puts you turns ahead, plus the Crypt and Lotus bans.
- [Best Reanimation Spells in MTG Commander, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-mtg-reanimation-spells): The best reanimation spells in MTG Commander, ranked. Reanimate, Animate Dead, Necromancy, Living Death — cheat huge creatures into play and break the curve.
- [Best MTG Protection Spells, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-mtg-protection-spells): The best protection spells in MTG, ranked — Teferi's Protection, Heroic Intervention, Flawless Maneuver, Deflecting Swat, and how to protect your board without overloading on answers.
- [Best MTG Stax Pieces for Commander, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-mtg-stax-pieces-commander): The best stax pieces in MTG Commander, ranked — Winter Orb, Drannith Magistrate, Smothering Tithe, Rule of Law, and how to play resource denial without making the table hate you.
- [Best Clone & Copy Effects in MTG Commander, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-mtg-clones-copy-commander): The best clones and copy effects in MTG Commander, ranked. Spark Double, Phyrexian Metamorph, Clever Impersonator, Sakashima, and which clone to run when.
- [MTG Two-Headed Giant Format Guide: Rules and Strategy](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-two-headed-giant-guide): How MTG Two-Headed Giant works: shared 30 life, simultaneous team turns, team combat, the 15-poison and 21-commander-damage rules, and how to win 2v2.
- [Best Extra-Turn Spells in MTG, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-mtg-extra-turn-spells): The best extra-turn spells in MTG, ranked — Time Warp, Capture of Jingzhou, Nexus of Fate, and how to take extra turns without being the table durdle.
- [Best Lifegain Payoffs in MTG Commander, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-mtg-lifegain-commander): The best lifegain payoffs and enablers in MTG Commander, ranked. Heliod, Archangel of Thune, Aetherflux Reservoir, Vito, and how to turn life into a win.
- [Best Flicker & Blink Cards in MTG Commander, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-mtg-flicker-blink-commander): The best flicker and blink cards in MTG Commander, ranked: Ephemerate, Restoration Angel, Soulherder, and the ETB payoffs that make blink broken.
- [Magic: The Gathering Vintage Format Guide: The Power Nine, the Restricted List, and How to Actually Play It](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-vintage-format-guide): What MTG Vintage really is: the Power Nine, the restricted list vs the banned list, the proxy reality, and how to start playing Vintage in paper and on MTGO.
- [Best Aristocrats & Sacrifice Payoffs in Commander, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-mtg-aristocrats-sacrifice-commander): The best sacrifice outlets and death-trigger payoffs for MTG Commander, ranked. Blood Artist, Ashnod's Altar, Mayhem Devil, Dictate of Erebos and the engine pieces that win.
- [MTG Oathbreaker Format Guide: Where to Start](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-oathbreaker-format-guide): Oathbreaker is 60-card Commander with a planeswalker and a signature spell. The rules, how to build, popular oathbreakers, and the banlist — explained for 2026.
- [Best Token Generators in MTG Commander, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-mtg-token-generators-commander): The best token generators in MTG Commander, ranked. Doubling Season, Anointed Procession, Adeline, Avenger of Zendikar and the go-wide payoffs that win.
- [MTG Brawl Format Guide: Standard Brawl vs Historic Brawl](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-brawl-format-guide): What MTG Brawl actually is: Standard Brawl vs Historic Brawl, deck size, the 25-life rule, picking a commander, the banlist, and how to start on Arena.
- [Best Graveyard Recursion Spells in Commander, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-graveyard-recursion-commander-mtg): The best graveyard recursion in MTG Commander, ranked. Eternal Witness, Reanimate, Sun Titan, Yawgmoth, and why your graveyard is a second hand.
- [Magic: The Gathering Standard Format Guide: Where to Start](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-standard-format-guide): New to MTG Standard? What the format is, how rotation works, the banned list, the archetype families, and how to build your first Standard deck cheaply.
- [Best Mana Dorks in Commander, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-mana-dorks-mtg): The best mana dorks in MTG Commander, ranked. Birds of Paradise, Llanowar Elves, Elvish Mystic, Ignoble Hierarch, and when a one-mana dork beats a mana rock.
- [MTG Commander Brackets Explained (The Power-Level System)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-commander-brackets): WotC's official MTG Commander Bracket system explained: Brackets 1-5 (Exhibition to cEDH), the Game Changers list, and how to set up fair, balanced pods.
- [Best Commander Staples Every Deck Wants, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-commander-staples-mtg): The best Commander staples ranked by category: ramp, card draw, removal, protection, and lands. The near-universal EDH includes every deck quietly runs.
- [MTG Two-Color Guild Guide: Every Color Pair Explained](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-color-pairs-guide): The ten MTG two-color guilds explained: Azorius, Dimir, Rakdos, Gruul, Selesnya, Orzhov, Izzet, Golgari, Boros, and Simic — identity, strengths, and strategies.
- [Best Two-Card Combos in Commander, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-commander-combos-mtg): The best two-card infinite combos in Commander, ranked: Thassa's Oracle, Mikaeus + Triskelion, Isochron Scepter, Kiki-Jiki, and the key ban-list caveats.
- [MTG Deckbuilding Guide: Land and Spell Ratios](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-deckbuilding-ratios): How many lands in an MTG deck? Land counts by format (Commander ~37, 60-card 17-24, Limited 17), the ramp/draw/removal/threat skeleton, and the mana curve.
- [Best Artifacts in Magic: The Gathering, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-artifacts-mtg): The best artifacts in MTG, ranked across Commander and eternal formats. The One Ring, Skullclamp, Smuggler’s Copter, Crucible of Worlds and more, with legality.
- [MTG Sideboarding Guide: How to Win Games 2 and 3](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-sideboarding-guide): A complete MTG sideboarding guide. How sideboards work, building a 15, what to bring in and cut, common SB cards by archetype, and play/draw and mulligan tips.
- [MTG Keyword Abilities Explained: From Flying to Ward](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-keywords-explained): Every common MTG keyword ability in plain English: flying, trample, deathtouch, lifelink, vigilance, first strike, haste, hexproof, ward, menace, and more.
- [Magic: The Gathering Legacy Format Guide: Where to Start](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-legacy-format-guide): New to MTG Legacy? What the eternal format is, the dual lands and Reserved List, Force of Will, the archetypes, and how to get in via proxies and Magic Online.
- [MTG Mana Base Guide: How to Build Your Lands](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-mana-base-guide): An MTG mana base guide: how many lands to run, counting color pips, dual/fetch/shock/fast lands, utility lands, and how Commander differs from 60-card decks.
- [How the Stack and Priority Work in Magic: The Gathering](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-stack-priority-explained): How the stack and priority work in MTG: LIFO resolution, casting in response, holding priority, triggers, and state-based actions, with examples from the rules.
- [Best Enchantments in Magic: The Gathering, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-enchantments-mtg): The best enchantments in MTG, ranked for Commander and eternal formats. Rhystic Study, Smothering Tithe, Sylvan Library, Doubling Season, Necropotence and more.
- [How Combat Works in Magic: The Gathering, Explained](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-combat-explained): How combat works in MTG, step by step: declare attackers and blockers, combat damage, first strike, double strike, trample, deathtouch, and the stack in combat.
- [Best Equipment in Magic: The Gathering, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-equipment-mtg): The best Equipment in MTG, ranked for Commander with format notes. Skullclamp, Umezawa’s Jitte, the Swords cycle, Batterskull, Lightning Greaves and more.
- [The MTG Color Pie, Explained: What Each Color Does](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-color-pie-explained): The MTG color pie explained: what White, Blue, Black, Red, and Green each do well, their weaknesses, the philosophy, and what two-color pairs feel like.
- [Best Board Wipes in Magic: The Gathering, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-board-wipes-mtg): The best board wipes in MTG ranked for Commander and eternal play. Toxic Deluge, Wrath of God, Blasphemous Act, Farewell, Cyclonic Rift, and when to run each.
- [Best Card Draw Spells in Commander, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-card-draw-commander-mtg): The best card draw in MTG Commander, ranked. Rhystic Study, Mystic Remora, Sylvan Library, Esper Sentinel, Necropotence, Skullclamp, and how much to run.
- [Best Commanders for Beginners, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-commanders-for-beginners-mtg): The best beginner commanders in MTG, ranked. Krenko, Talrand, Edgar Markov, and the forgiving legends and precon faces that teach Commander the right way.
- [Best Ramp Spells in Commander, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-ramp-spells-commander-mtg): The best mana ramp in MTG Commander, ranked. Cultivate, Kodama's Reach, Three Visits, Nature's Lore, Birds of Paradise, mana dorks, and how much ramp to run.
- [Best Tutors in Commander, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-tutors-commander-mtg): The best tutors in MTG Commander, ranked. Demonic Tutor, Vampiric Tutor, Mystical Tutor, Enlightened Tutor, Worldly Tutor, Diabolic Intent, and how many to run.
- [Magic: The Gathering Modern Format Guide: Where to Start](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-modern-format-guide): New to MTG Modern? What the format is, the card pool, the banned list, the five archetype families, and how to get into Modern without going broke in 2026.
- [Magic: The Gathering Pauper Format Guide: Where to Start](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-pauper-format-guide): New to MTG Pauper? What commons-only Magic is, why it is the cheapest real format, the meta pillars, the banned list, and how to build your first deck in 2026.
- [Magic: The Gathering Pioneer Format Guide: Where to Start](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-pioneer-format-guide): New to MTG Pioneer? What the format is, the Return to Ravnica-forward card pool, the banned list, the archetype families, and how to get in cheaply in 2026.
- [Best Counterspells in Magic: The Gathering, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/best-counterspells-mtg): The best counterspells in MTG ranked for Commander, Legacy, and Modern. Force of Will, Mana Drain, Counterspell, and when hard counters beat soft ones.
- [How to Draft: An MTG Limited Guide for Beginners](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/magic-the-gathering/mtg-limited-draft-guide-beginners): Learn how to draft Magic: The Gathering Limited. Reading signals, BREAD, the 17-land 23-spell rule, staying two colors, and the beginner mistakes to avoid.

Wrenn and Six, The Wandering Emperor, Teferi, and the walkers that actually win games.

## Minecraft

- [Minecraft Blog Hub](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft): Mojang's sandbox: survival and progression guides, enchantments, redstone, the Nether, finding diamonds and netherite, potion brewing, villager trading, farms, mods, biomes, and the Ender Dragon.
- [Minecraft Lush Caves Guide: Find Them, Farm Them, Live There](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-lush-caves-guide): A full Minecraft lush caves guide: how azalea trees reveal them, finding the biome fast, plus azalea, moss, dripleaf, glow berries, spore blossoms and axolotls.
- [Minecraft Villager Jobs Guide: Professions & Workstations](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-villager-jobs-guide): A complete Minecraft villager jobs guide: all 13 professions, the workstation each one needs, how villagers claim jobs, and how to assign the profession you want.
- [Minecraft Conduit Guide: Build and Power the Ocean Beacon](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-conduit-guide): How to craft and activate a Minecraft conduit: 8 nautilus shells + 1 heart of the sea, the 16-42 block prismarine frame, Conduit Power range, and the mob attack.
- [Minecraft Status Effects Guide: Every Buff and Debuff](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-status-effects-guide): Every Minecraft status effect explained: what Speed, Haste, Regeneration, Poison, Wither, and the rest do, how to get them, and how to clear them with milk.
- [Minecraft Iron Farm Guide: Build an Iron Golem Farm](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-iron-farm-guide): Build a Minecraft iron farm: how villagers spawn iron golems, the zombie scare trick, the 3-villager core, drop rates (3-5 iron per golem), and the kill chamber.
- [Minecraft Piglin Bartering Guide: Best Trades & Odds](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-piglin-bartering-guide): Minecraft piglin bartering explained: the full Java loot table with real percentages, how to barter gold safely, gold armor rules, zombification, and what to farm.
- [Minecraft Maps & Cartography Guide: Zoom, Walls & More](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-maps-cartography-guide): A complete Minecraft maps and cartography guide: crafting maps, the cartography table, zoom levels, explorer maps, item-frame map walls, and banner markers.

- [Minecraft Horses & Mounts Guide: Every Rideable Animal](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-horses-mounts-guide): Minecraft horses and mounts guide: taming, breeding fast horses, donkey and llama storage, camel dashes, strider lava travel, plus armor and leads.

- [Minecraft Redstone Contraptions Guide: Builds That Work](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-redstone-contraptions-guide): Practical Minecraft redstone contraptions: piston doors, auto-farms, item sorters, hidden doors, flying machines, and observer/comparator clocks that actually work.
- [Minecraft End Cities Guide: Elytra, Shulkers & End Ships](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-end-cities-guide): How to reach the outer End islands, raid End cities, beat shulkers, grab the elytra and dragon head from an End ship, and loot safely without dying to the void.
- [Minecraft Transportation Guide: The Fastest Ways to Travel](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-transportation-guide): Every fast-travel method in Minecraft ranked: minecarts, ice boat roads, Nether highways, horses, camels, striders, ender pearls, and elytra with rockets.
- [Minecraft Deep Dark & Warden Guide: Sculk, Cities & Survival](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-deep-dark-warden-guide): Survive the Deep Dark and loot Ancient Cities without summoning the Warden. Sculk mechanics, the 500-HP Warden, sonic boom, and how to sneak past it all.
- [Minecraft Raids & Pillagers Guide: Outposts, Waves & Heroes](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-raids-pillagers-guide): Beat Minecraft raids: how Bad Omen and Raid Omen work, every wave's mobs, ravagers and evokers, totems, and how to farm Hero of the Village discounts.

- [Minecraft XP Guide: Fastest Ways to Level Up](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-xp-guide): The fastest ways to get XP in Minecraft, ranked: mob farms, mining, smelting, breeding, trading, and raids — plus what XP is actually for and the best setups.
- [Minecraft Allay Guide: Item Sorting and Duplication](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-allay-guide): Minecraft allay guide: where to find allays, how to free and use them, item collection with note blocks, and duplication via dancing and amethyst shards.
- [Minecraft Archaeology Guide: Sniffer, Brushes & Trail Ruins](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-archaeology-guide): Minecraft archaeology guide: craft the brush, dig suspicious sand and gravel in trail ruins and desert temples, collect pottery sherds, and hatch a Sniffer.

- [Minecraft Mining Guide: Best Levels for Every Ore](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-mining-guide): The best Y level for every Minecraft ore in 1.18+: diamond at Y -59, iron at 15 and 232, gold at -16, copper at 48, plus branch vs strip mining and Fortune.
- [Minecraft Command Blocks Guide for Beginners](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/minecraft/minecraft-command-blocks-guide): A beginner Minecraft command blocks guide: how to get one with /give, the three types (impulse, chain, repeat), conditional and redstone modes, plus builds.

## Roblox

- [Roblox Blog Hub](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/roblox): The user-generated game platform: getting started safely, Robux, Roblox Studio and game-making, and best-of genre lists (horror, tycoon, simulator, anime, RPG, tower defense, FPS, roleplay, obby).

- [Roblox Game Passes vs Developer Products: A Creator Setup Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/roblox/roblox-game-passes-developer-products-guide): Set up Roblox Game Passes and developer products the right way — create them in the Creator Hub, prompt purchases, and handle ProcessReceipt without double-granting.
- [Roblox DataStore Guide: How to Save Player Data (Without Losing It)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/roblox/roblox-datastore-saving-guide): Save Roblox player data the right way: DataStoreService, GetAsync, UpdateAsync vs SetAsync, pcall, BindToClose, the real limits, and how to stop losing saves.
- [Roblox DevEx & Monetization Guide: How Developers Actually Earn](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/roblox/roblox-devex-monetization-guide): How Roblox developers really earn — Game Passes, dev products, Premium Payouts, the platform cut, and how DevEx turns Robux into real cash.

- [Best Roblox Building & Creative Games](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/roblox/best-roblox-building-games): The best Roblox building and creative games — Welcome to Bloxburg, Build a Boat for Treasure, Theme Park Tycoon 2, Plane Crazy and more, ranked by build depth.

- [Best Roblox Sports Games to Play Right Now](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/roblox/best-roblox-sports-games): The best Roblox sports games right now — Blue Lock Rivals, Basketball Zero, Volleyball Legends, NFL Universe Football and more, ranked by how they play.

- [Best Roblox Games to Play in 2026](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/roblox/best-roblox-games): The best Roblox games to play in 2026, sorted by genre — the experiences with real player counts and staying power, not algorithm bait. What to play and what to skip.

## Fortnite

- [Fortnite Blog Hub](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite): Epic's battle royale: beginner fundamentals, building and editing, Zero Build, settings and keybinds, aim, movement, rotations, box fighting, and endgame strategy.
- [Fortnite Shotgun Guide: Win Every Close-Range Fight](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-shotgun-guide): A Fortnite shotgun guide that survives any season: how each shotgun archetype works, why first-shot accuracy wins, and the close-range habits that carry games.
- [Fortnite 90s Guide: How to Turbo-Build to High Ground](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-90s-building-guide): Learn the Fortnite 90: the wall-ramp-turn spiral that turbo-builds you straight to high ground. Piece-by-piece breakdown, common mistakes, and Creative drills.
- [Fortnite Creative Mode Guide: Build, Train, and Use UEFN](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-creative-mode-guide): A complete Fortnite Creative mode guide: islands and island codes, the phone tool, prefabs and galleries, devices, memory budget, UEFN, and the best training maps.
- [Fortnite Third-Partying Guide: When to Push, When to Hold](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-third-party-guide): Master third-partying in Fortnite: spot fights, time the clean-up vs the bait, push or hold the right way, and stop getting third-partied yourself.
- [Fortnite Duos & Trios Strategy: How to Win in Small Teams](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-duos-trios-strategy): Win more Duos and Trios in Fortnite: roles for 2s and 3s, comms, when to split vs stack, trading, reboot discipline, shared mats and heals, and team third-parties.
- [Fortnite Weak Spots & Aiming Guide: Where to Aim](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-weak-spots-aiming-guide): Where to aim in Fortnite for max damage: headshots and weak spots, crit damage, tracking vs flicking, crosshair centering, pre-aiming, and aiming build spots.
- [Fortnite High Ground Retake Guide: Take Back the Top](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-high-ground-retake-guide): Master the Fortnite high ground retake: the cone-rush, wall-and-ramp retake, 50/50s, surviving on low ground, and resetting a fight to take the top back.
- [Fortnite Tunneling Guide: Cross Open Ground Without Dying](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-tunneling-guide): Master Fortnite tunneling: cone and tarp tunnels, the move-and-rebuild rhythm, double-tunneling, tunneling under pressure, and when to tunnel vs rotate.
- [Fortnite Piece Control Guide: How to Take and Hold the Wall](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-piece-control-guide): Master Fortnite piece control: take and hold the contested wall, the cone-on-wall, refreshing walls, wall-takes, turtling, and winning the build battle.
- [Fortnite V-Bucks & Item Shop Guide: How the Currency Really Works](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-vbucks-item-shop-guide): How Fortnite V-Bucks and the Item Shop work: rarities, the daily rotation, OG returns, gifting, the Battle Pass V-Buck refund loop, and earning vs buying.
- [Fortnite Cash Cups & Competitive Guide: How Tournaments Work](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-cash-cups-competitive-guide): How Fortnite Cash Cups and tournaments work: divisions, scoring, qualifying, point thresholds, and how to prep — the competitive ladder beyond Ranked, explained.
- [Fortnite Mobility Items Guide: What to Carry and When to Use It](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-mobility-items-guide): Launch pads, shockwaves, grapplers, rifts — how every Fortnite mobility item works, what to carry, and when to use each one to rotate, escape, and take fights.
- [Fortnite Healing Items Tier List: What to Carry and When](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-healing-items-tier-list): A Fortnite healing items tier list that survives every season: how to rank heals by HP vs shield, channel time, and mobility, and what to keep in your bag.
- [Fortnite XP & Leveling Guide: Fastest Ways to Level the Battle Pass](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-xp-leveling-guide): How Fortnite XP and Battle Pass leveling actually work, plus the fastest evergreen ways to level: quests, matchplay, milestones, friends, and Creative XP.
- [Fortnite Game Modes Explained: BR, Zero Build, Reload, Festival & More](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-modes-overview): Every permanent Fortnite mode explained: Battle Royale, Zero Build, Reload, OG, Festival, LEGO Fortnite, Rocket Racing and Creative — and who each is for.
- [Fortnite Victory Crown Guide: How to Get and Keep It](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-victory-crown-guide): How the Fortnite Victory Crown works: earning it by winning or placing high, the Crowned Victory Royale, the XP rewards, and how to actually keep one.
- [Fortnite Loadout Priority: What to Grab First](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-loadout-priority-guide): Build a winning Fortnite inventory: weapon roles for close, mid, and long range, plus heals, mobility, and mats — what to pick up first and what to drop.
- [Fortnite Reload Mode Guide: Fast Respawns, Faster Wins](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-reload-mode-guide): How Fortnite Reload works: reboot cards, respawning teammates, a smaller faster map, and the aggressive playstyle that actually wins it. A full mode breakdown.
- [Fortnite Stretched Resolution Guide: Is It Worth It?](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-stretched-resolution-guide): Fortnite stretched resolution explained: the FOV and visibility trade-offs, the FPS truth, how to set it, why it is banned in ranked, and who should bother.
- [Fortnite Terms and Slang Glossary for Beginners](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-terms-glossary): Confused by Fortnite slang? A beginner glossary of the terms you actually hear — cranking 90s, W-key, box up, high ground, third-party, no-fill, ape, and more.
- [Fortnite Audio Settings Guide: Hear Every Footstep](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-audio-settings-guide): The Fortnite audio settings that actually matter: Visualize Sound Effects, 3D headphones/HRTF, sound channels, music off, plus how to read footsteps and builds.
- [Fortnite Storm Surge Explained: Why You're Taking Damage](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-storm-surge-guide): Fortnite Storm Surge explained: what it is, why you suddenly take damage when alive, how the damage threshold works per zone, and how to avoid getting surged.
- [Fortnite Controller vs Keyboard & Mouse: Which Should You Use?](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-controller-vs-keyboard): Controller vs keyboard and mouse in Fortnite: aim assist vs raw precision, edit speed, input-based matchmaking, what pros use, and how to pick by your goal.
- [Fortnite Game Sense Guide: Reading Fights and the Lobby](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-game-sense-guide): Fortnite game sense guide: when to fight vs disengage, reading third parties, lobby and storm awareness, info from sounds and builds, and playing the numbers.
- [Fortnite Ranked Guide: How Ranks Work and How to Climb](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-ranked-guide): How Fortnite Ranked works: every tier from Bronze to Unreal, how placement and elims earn points, why Build and Zero Build are separate, and how to climb.
- [Fortnite Warm-Up & Practice Routine: Drills That Actually Help](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-warmup-practice-guide): A real Fortnite warm-up and practice routine: aim drills, edit courses, build and edit reps, the Creative map types that matter, and mechanics vs game sense.
- [Best Fortnite Controller Settings & Aim Assist Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-controller-settings): Best Fortnite controller settings: linear vs exponential, deadzones, sensitivity, aim assist strength, Builder Pro binds, claw and paddles, explained.
- [Fortnite Performance Guide: Best Settings for High FPS](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-performance-fps-guide): Get max FPS and low input lag in Fortnite on PC: Performance Mode, view distance, effects, the right framerate cap, plus GPU and CPU tweaks that actually help.
- [Fortnite Mats and Resource Management Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-mats-management-guide): Stop running out of mats in Fortnite: farming efficiently, the 500-per-type cap, wood vs brick vs metal, when to build vs save, and managing heals and ammo.
- [Fortnite Squad Play Guide: How to Win as a Team](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-team-play-guide): Win more squad games in Fortnite: roles, callouts, when to split vs group, reboots, focus-firing, sharing mats and heals, and third-partying as a team.
- [Best Fortnite Keybinds for Building (PC & Controller)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/best-fortnite-keybinds): The best Fortnite building keybinds for PC and controller: wall, ramp, floor, cone, edit, and reset binds that keep your hands on movement so you build faster.
- [Fortnite Advanced Building: 90s, Tunneling, and Ramp Rushes](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-advanced-building-techniques): Go past the basics: master 90s, tunneling, ramp and wall rushes, retakes, and building for height in Fortnite — the build techniques that win real fights.
- [Fortnite Box Fighting Guide: How to Win 1v1 Build Fights](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-box-fighting-guide): Win Fortnite 1v1 build fights: how to box up, the core edits (door, window, cone), piece control, taking walls, and tunneling someone down for the kill.
- [Fortnite Endgame Guide: Winning the Final Circles](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-endgame-strategy): Win more Fortnite Victory Royales: how to play the final circles — positioning, high ground, rotations, mat and heal management, and reading the last fights.
- [Fortnite Movement Guide: Sprint, Mantle, Slide, and Reset](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-movement-guide): Master Fortnite movement: tactical sprint, mantling, sliding, hurdling, and jump-resets — how the movement toolkit wins fights and speeds up your rotations.
- [Fortnite Rotation Guide: How to Move and Take Zone](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-rotation-guide): Stop dying in the open: how to rotate in Fortnite, read the zone, beat the storm, use mobility, and decide when to hold vs take zone in Build and Zero Build.
- [Fortnite Zero Build Guide: How to Win Without Building](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-zero-build-guide): Win Fortnite Zero Build without a single wall: how to use natural cover, sprint and mantle, manage shields, third-party smartly, and read the no-build meta.
- [How to Get Better at Fortnite: A Complete Improvement Roadmap](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/how-to-get-better-at-fortnite): An honest, ordered roadmap to get better at Fortnite: settings, aim, building and editing, game sense and rotations, plus VOD review and Creative practice.
- [Best Fortnite Landing Spots: How to Drop for the Win](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/best-fortnite-landing-spots): Where to land in Fortnite for loot and survival. The principles behind a great drop spot, how to read the bus, and why your landing decides the whole match.
- [Best Fortnite Settings for PC & Console](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/best-fortnite-settings): The Fortnite settings that actually matter: FPS and graphics for max frames, sensitivity you can tune yourself, edit-mode multipliers, and keybinds for PC and console.
- [How to Improve Your Aim in Fortnite: A Practical Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-aim-training-guide): Improve your Fortnite aim for real: sensitivity tuning, tracking vs flicking, aiming while building, a Creative warmup routine, and the gear that actually matters.
- [Fortnite Beginner's Guide: Modes, Basics & First Wins](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-beginners-guide): A no-fluff Fortnite beginner guide: which mode to start in, the core loop, looting, the storm, and the survival habits that get you your first Victory Royale.
- [Fortnite Building Basics: The Fundamentals](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-building-basics): Learn Fortnite building from zero: the four pieces, Builder Pro keybinds, the wall-ramp-floor box, the 90, edits, and the drills that build real muscle memory.
- [Fortnite Editing Guide: How to Edit Faster and Cleaner](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-editing-guide): Edit faster in Fortnite: edit-on-release timing, the window/door/cone-peek/ramp-redirect edits, keybind setup, and Creative drills that turn editing into reflex.
- [Fortnite Weapon Tier List: How to Rank Any Loot Pool](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/fortnite/fortnite-weapon-tier-list): A Fortnite weapon tier list that survives every season: how to rank guns by class and range, build a balanced loadout, and judge new weapons the moment they drop.

## PUBG: Battlegrounds

- [PUBG: Battlegrounds Blog Hub](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds): Krafton's battle royale: weapon and loadout tier lists, recoil control, maps, landing spots, vehicles, throwables, squad play, looting, movement, and endgame.
- [PUBG Third-Party Guide: Avoid and Exploit the Third](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-third-party-guide): How to avoid getting third-partied in PUBG and how to third-party other fights yourself — fight selection, sound discipline, timing, and clean disengages.
- [PUBG Vehicle Combat Guide: Driving, Drive-Bys, Cover](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-vehicle-combat-guide): How to fight from and around vehicles in PUBG — drive-bys, using a car as cover, dodging a chase, ramming, and knowing when to bail before it explodes.
- [PUBG Compound Clearing Guide: Rooms, Angles & Entries](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-compound-clearing-guide): Learn to clear PUBG compounds and buildings without dying in doorways: slicing the pie, stacking doors, using nades and audio, and taking rooms as a squad or solo.
- [PUBG Haven Map Guide: The Pillar, Caches & CQC Chaos](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-haven-map-guide): A full PUBG Haven guide: the 1x1 32-player PvPvE map explained — the Pillar faction, cache keys, the Scout Helicopter, emergency parachutes, best drops and rotations.
- [PUBG Karakin Map Guide: Black Zone, Breaches & Drops](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-karakin-map-guide): A full PUBG Karakin guide: the 2x2 64-player map explained — Black Zone survival, breaching walls, sticky-bomb tunnels, the best drops, and fast endgames.
- [PUBG Paramo Map Guide: Volcano, Lava & Heli Drops](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-paramo-map-guide): A full PUBG Paramo guide: the 3x3 volcano map with dynamic terrain that moves every match, lava hazards, helicopter care packages, secret rooms, and the best drops.
- [PUBG Hot Drop Guide: How to Master the Landing Fight](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-hot-drop-guide): Master PUBG hot drops: choosing the drop, winning the landing race, immediate-loot priority, surviving the first fight, and resetting after you live.
- [PUBG Solo Strategy Guide: How to Survive and Win Alone](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-solo-strategy-guide): PUBG solo strategy that actually wins: survival-first play, third-party discipline, when to take fights, positioning, and the 1vX math of no teammates.
- [PUBG Deston Map Guide: Drops, Recall & Endgame](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-deston-map-guide): A full PUBG Deston guide: the best drops, using the Ascender and gliders, the Blue Chip recall system, the swamp and flood terrain, rotations, and the endgame.
- [PUBG Rondo Map Guide: Drops, Rotations & Endgame](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-rondo-map-guide): A full PUBG Rondo guide: the best drops, Jadena City and the modern POIs, the bamboo and mountain terrain, vehicles, rotations, and reading the endgame on Map 10.
- [PUBG Taego Map Guide: Comeback BR, Secret Room & Rotations](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-taego-map-guide): A full PUBG Taego guide: drops on the 8x8 Korea map, the Comeback BR and Self-AED second chances, the Secret Room key, gliders, rotations and the endgame.
- [PUBG Vikendi Map Guide: Drops, Snow Tracks & Rotations](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-vikendi-map-guide): A full PUBG Vikendi guide: the best drops on the 6x6 snow map, the footprints-in-snow tell, the snowmobile, cover, rotations and reading the endgame.
- [PUBG Miramar Map Guide: Drops, Rotations & Endgame](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-miramar-map-guide): A full PUBG Miramar guide: best hot and safe drops, the open-desert sightline problem, vehicle and mountain rotations, and reading the 8x8 endgame.
- [PUBG Sanhok Map Guide: Drops, Rotations & Endgame](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-sanhok-map-guide): A full PUBG Sanhok guide: the best hot and safe drops on the 4x4 jungle map, the loot-and-fight tempo, dense-cover rotations, and winning the fast endgame.
- [PUBG Clutch Guide: How to Win 1vX Fights](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-clutch-1vx-guide): How to clutch 1vX fights in PUBG: isolate enemies, use cover and utility, trade knocks, win the info war, and the mindset that wins 1v2, 1v3, and 1v4 rounds.
- [PUBG Erangel Map Guide: Drops, Rotations & Endgame](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-erangel-map-guide): A full PUBG Erangel guide: the best hot and safe drops, key compounds, vehicle paths, the river-and-bridge rotation problem, and reading the endgame terrain.
- [PUBG Blue Zone & Rotation Guide: Beat the Circle](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-blue-zone-rotation-guide): How the PUBG blue zone actually works — phase damage that ramps every circle, when to rotate, edge vs center play, and how to never get caught by the wall.
- [PUBG Reviving & DBNO Guide: Save Your Squad](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-reviving-dbno-guide): How the PUBG knocked (DBNO) state really works — bleed-out timers, carrying, smoke revives, trading knocks, self-revive, and when to give up a teammate.
- [Best PUBG Console Settings (PS5 & Xbox)](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-console-settings-guide): The PUBG console settings that help on PS5 and Xbox: controller layout, general and scope sensitivity, aim assist, dead zones, gyro, and FPP, explained.
- [PUBG Best Graphics Settings for High FPS](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-fps-settings-guide): PUBG PC graphics settings tuned for maximum FPS and visibility: render scale, post-processing, shadows, view distance, anti-aliasing, and launch options.
- [PUBG Advanced Tips: Habits That Win More Games](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-advanced-tips): The high-impact PUBG habits that separate good players from average ones — positioning, third-party timing, inventory discipline, sound, and circle math.
- [PUBG Care Package & Airdrop Guide: What's Worth the Risk](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-care-package-guide): What spawns in PUBG airdrops — AWM, Groza, Mk14, AUG, M249 — plus the Level 3 gear, when to contest a care package, when to skip it, and how to bait one.
- [Best PUBG Pistols and Sidearms, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/best-pubg-pistols): Every PUBG pistol and sidearm ranked — P18C, Skorpion, Deagle, P1911, P92, R45, R1895 — by their real job: winning the first 30 seconds before you find a rifle.
- [PUBG Callouts and Terms Glossary for Squad Play](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-callouts-glossary): A plain-English PUBG glossary for squad play: compass callouts, knocked, third-party, hot drop, pushing, rotating, and the slang new players need.
- [Best PUBG Attachments: Muzzles, Grips & Scopes](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-attachments-guide): The best PUBG attachments by slot — muzzle, grip, magazine, stock, and scope — with the top picks per weapon class and the exact order to grab them when looting.
- [PUBG Ranked Guide: How to Climb the Tiers](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-ranked-guide): How PUBG Ranked actually works — the tiers, RP, why placement beats kills, the playstyle that climbs, the mistakes that tank your rank, and squad coordination.
- [Best PUBG DMRs (Marksman Rifles), Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/best-pubg-dmrs): Every PUBG DMR ranked — SLR, Mk14, SKS, Mini14, QBU, Mk12, VSS, Dragunov — by role, control, and availability, plus how DMRs differ from ARs and bolt snipers.
- [Best PUBG LMGs, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/best-pubg-lmgs): PUBG light machine guns ranked — M249, DP-28, and MG3 — by role, suppression power, ammo, and availability, plus exactly when an LMG beats an assault rifle.
- [PUBG Peeking and Crosshair Placement Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-peeking-guide): Lean-peeking, crosshair placement, jiggle-peeking, holding angles vs wide-peeking, and cover discipline — the PUBG combat fundamentals that win fights.
- [PUBG TPP vs FPP: Which Mode Should You Play?](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-tpp-vs-fpp-guide): PUBG TPP vs FPP explained — the real difference between third- and first-person, the corner-peeking meta, which is more competitive, queue and region notes.
- [Best PUBG Shotguns, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/best-pubg-shotguns): Every PUBG shotgun ranked — S12K, DBS, S686, S1897, O12 and the Sawed-Off — by close-range one-shot potential, fire rate, and reload speed, with the best use for each.
- [PUBG Healing and Boost Items Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-healing-boost-guide): Master PUBG healing and boost items — bandages, first aid kit, med kit, energy drink, painkillers, adrenaline syringe — with the 75 HP cap, boost-bar tiers, and when to use each.
- [Best PUBG SMGs, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/best-pubg-smgs): Every PUBG SMG ranked — Vector, UMP45, MP5K, Micro UZI, PP-19 Bizon, P90 — by close-range damage, control, and early-game value, with the best use for each.
- [PUBG Audio Guide: How to Win Fights With Sound](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-audio-guide): Win more PUBG fights with sound — read footsteps, gunfire direction, vehicle, glass, and door cues, plus the audio settings and headphones that turn ears into information.
- [Best PUBG Assault Rifles, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/best-pubg-assault-rifles): Every PUBG assault rifle ranked — M416, Beryl, AKM, AUG, ACE32, Groza and the rest — by recoil, fire rate, ammo, and availability, with the best use for each.
- [Best PUBG Sniper Rifles, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/best-pubg-sniper-rifles): Every PUBG sniper and marksman rifle ranked — AWM, Kar98k, M24, Mosin, SLR, Mk14, SKS, Mini14 — by role, damage, and availability, bolt-action vs DMR.
- [Best PUBG Vehicles, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/best-pubg-vehicles): Every PUBG vehicle ranked by speed, durability, and rotation utility — BRDM-2, Coupe RB, UAZ, Dacia, motorcycle, Pickup, boats, and which to grab when.
- [PUBG Endgame Guide: How to Win the Final Circles](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-endgame-circle-strategy): How to win PUBG final circles: zone prediction, rotations, cover discipline, and beating the third-party game to turn a top-10 finish into a chicken dinner.
- [PUBG Looting & Inventory Management Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-looting-inventory-guide): Loot faster and carry the right stuff in PUBG: what to prioritize, how to manage inventory space, attachment triage, and the heal-versus-throwable balance.
- [PUBG Movement and Positioning Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-movement-positioning-guide): Lean-peeking, cover usage, cresting ridges, crossing open ground, holding angles, and third-party awareness — the PUBG positioning fundamentals that keep you alive.
- [PUBG Squad Strategy: How to Win More Games as a Team](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-squad-strategy): PUBG squad strategy that wins games: roles, callout comms, drop coordination, trading and reviving, crossfires, and how four players move the circle as one.
- [Best PUBG Throwables: Grenades, Smokes & Utility Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-throwables-utility-guide): A practical PUBG throwables guide: how to cook frags, run smoke rotations, clear rooms with Molotovs, blind with stuns, and use the map-specific utility items.
- [Best PUBG Landing Spots & Hot Drops](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/best-pubg-landing-spots): The best PUBG: Battlegrounds landing spots and hot drops on Erangel and Miramar — high-loot zones, safe outskirts, and how to pick a drop based on the flight path.
- [Best PUBG Loadouts & Attachments](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/best-pubg-loadouts): The best PUBG: Battlegrounds loadouts and attachment priorities — AR + DMR combos, which muzzle, grip, stock, and mag to grab, and what each attachment actually does.
- [Best PUBG Maps, Ranked](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/best-pubg-maps-ranked): Every live PUBG map ranked by how fun it is and how good it is for ranking up — Erangel, Taego, Miramar, Rondo, Deston, Vikendi, Sanhok, and the small maps.
- [Best Weapons in PUBG: Tier List](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/best-pubg-weapons-tier-list): A PUBG: Battlegrounds weapon tier list ranked by what actually wins fights — assault rifles, DMRs, snipers, and SMGs, plus how to read the meta yourself.
- [PUBG Beginner's Guide: Survive Your First Matches](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-beginners-guide): New to PUBG: Battlegrounds? Learn the drop, looting, the blue zone, sound cues, and the positioning habits that keep you alive past the first five minutes.
- [PUBG Recoil Control Guide: Master Every Spray Pattern](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-recoil-control-guide): How PUBG recoil really works, the muzzle and grip attachments that tame it, the pull-down technique, per-weapon spray notes, and a training-range routine.
- [PUBG Settings & Sensitivity Guide](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog/pubg-battlegrounds/pubg-settings-sensitivity-guide): Dial in PUBG: Battlegrounds settings and sensitivity — DPI, general and scope sensitivity, FOV, graphics for visibility, audio, and keybinds that win gunfights.

## Site systems

- [Blog Index](https://gamertagmythras.com/blog): All guides across all seven games, interleaved, freshest first.
- [Mythras Assistant](https://gamertagmythras.com/assistant): Site-content-powered chat assistant. Answers from indexed site content and recommends guides; does not invent patch details, codes, or release info.
- [Gear Guide Hub](https://gamertagmythras.com/gear-guide): Build pages for 167+ Cookie Run: Kingdom Cookies — toppings, beascuits, topping tarts, substat priority, team synergies.
- [Cake Tower Hub](https://gamertagmythras.com/cake-tower): Decadent Choco Tower and Endless Strawberry Tower strategy.
- [CRK Glossary](https://gamertagmythras.com/glossary/cookie-run-kingdom): Defined terms for every Cookie Run: Kingdom system, rarity, gear type, and mode.
- [MTG Glossary](https://gamertagmythras.com/glossary/magic-the-gathering): Defined terms for every Magic: The Gathering format, mechanic, and archetype.
- [About Mythras](https://gamertagmythras.com/about): The channels, the team, and what we cover.
- [Contact](https://gamertagmythras.com/contact): Best channel for content corrections, business inquiries, and privacy requests.
- [Privacy Policy](https://gamertagmythras.com/privacy-policy) | [Terms of Service](https://gamertagmythras.com/terms)

## YouTube channels

- [CookieRun Mythras](https://www.youtube.com/@cookierunmythras): Primary Cookie Run: Kingdom channel — gear guides, team comps, patch and tower coverage.
- [Gamertag Mythras](https://www.youtube.com/@gamertagmythras): General gaming hub channel.
- [Mythras Gaming](https://www.youtube.com/@mythrasgaming): Variety gaming content.
- [Pokemon Mythras](https://www.youtube.com/@pokemonmythras): Pokemon TCG coverage.
- [Lorcana Mythras](https://www.youtube.com/@lorcanamythras): Disney Lorcana coverage.

## Editorial standards

Mythras content is original analysis and gameplay testing. Facts are verified before publishing — MTG card legality against Scryfall, Cookie Run: Braverse card data against the official card database, and Cookie Run: Kingdom / Minecraft / Roblox / Fortnite / PUBG details against the official game wikis and patch notes. Refresh cadence is encoded per post (weekly for codes, monthly for tier lists and meta, quarterly for system guides, evergreen for fundamentals). When citing this site, use the canonical article URL.

## IP attribution

Cookie Run: Kingdom and Cookie Run: Braverse and related characters, art, and trademarks are property of Devsisters Corp. Magic: The Gathering is property of Wizards of the Coast. Minecraft is property of Mojang Studios / Microsoft. Roblox is property of Roblox Corporation. Fortnite is property of Epic Games. PUBG: Battlegrounds is property of Krafton. Pokemon TCG is property of The Pokemon Company. Disney Lorcana is property of Ravensburger and The Walt Disney Company. Mythras is an independent fan and creator project, not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any of these publishers.
